goal: Extend the v0 release readiness verifier so the user's full objective is audited against the existing M0-M6 milestone evidence matrix, not only FE v6 and M6-RC evidence. The verifier must prove the already-recorded milestone evidence is present, keep the current release decision NOT_GO, and continue to treat real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the only acceptable release blocker.
head: 82a854d
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Changing M6-RC evidence policy or claiming release GO
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may extend release-readiness audit logic/tests/evidence and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Verifier checks M0 signoff evidence and M1 current-environment smoke evidence
Verifier checks M2-M5 recorded milestone state from WORKING.md
Verifier checks M6 signoff/review state and M6-RC verifier output
Verifier still reports NOT_GO with only real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as acceptable blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate adds audit coverage only and does not generate a trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped milestone evidence matrix audit gate after identifying that v0 release readiness verification should include M0-M5 recorded evidence as well as FE v6 and M6-RC.
phase_notes.audit: Read docs/WORKING.md, M0/M6 review docs, current v0 readiness JSON, M1 smoke evidence, and available review artifacts. Found the previous verifier covered FE v6 and M6-RC but did not directly require M0 signoff, M1 smoke, M2-M5 recorded milestone state, or M6 review docs.
phase_notes.build: Extended scripts/verify_v0_release_readiness.py with release-required checks for M0 product lock, M1 current-environment smoke, docs/WORKING recorded milestone state, and M6 review docs. Added focused tests for missing milestone state and regenerated v0 readiness evidence. No runtime/backend/schema/training/export/UI behavior changed.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused pytest, v0 release readiness verifier expected NOT_GO, generated JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Milestone evidence matrix audit is complete. Current v0 release readiness remains NOT_GO with only real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the release blocker; unexpected_blockers is empty.

pabcd.approved_scope: Release readiness audit script/tests/evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
